form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Latest effort finished 6th on April 8 over 300m at this track behind Watch Her Win beaten 8 lengths (18.10) in a Grade 5. Has run blistering time here with a 17.36 PB at the distance. Hard to beat.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Suited by inside box. Latest effort finished 6th on April 8 over 300m at this track behind Watch Her Win beaten 8 lengths (18.10) in a Grade 5. Has run blistering time here with a 17.36 PB at the distance. Hard to beat.

form.formComment: Recorded a 3.5 lengths win (17.58) in a Free For All last time at this track. Has two successes and two minors from eight starts from box 2. Can hit the frame with the right run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Recorded a 3.5 lengths win (17.58) in a Free For All last time at this track. Has two successes and two minors from eight starts from box 2. Can hit the frame with the right run.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Heels galloped on rounding the first turn.

form.formComment: Was fifth in a Grade 5 two back then given a eight months break after failing to finish at this track last time. No luck latest but this looks tough and prefer the place.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was fifth in a Grade 5 two back then given a eight months break after failing to finish at this track last time. No luck latest but this looks tough and prefer the place.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened for room entering the first turn.
Tightened for room and lost ground entering the first turn.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 300m. Last start finished 3rd on April 11 over 300m at this track behind Nature Boy beaten 7 lengths (17.85) in a Grade 4. Thereabouts at the last couple. Suited here and likely to run well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 300m. Last start finished 3rd on April 11 over 300m at this track behind Nature Boy beaten 7 lengths (17.85) in a Grade 4. Thereabouts at the last couple. Suited here and likely to run well.

form.formComment: Showed strong pace early but found one better when a one length second over 300m this track in 17.61. Has ability and can run well.

formComments.comment: Showed strong pace early but found one better when a one length second over 300m this track in 17.61. Has ability and can run well.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off the heels rounding the home turn.
Improved onto the heels entering the back straight and lost ground.

form.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at this track over 300m in 17.23 last start, beating Zipping Gidey. Recorded two placings in a row before she was rewarded with a win most recently. Expected to go well again.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (18.15) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing seventh and beaten 9 lengths. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed three times. Looking to others.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (17.68) at this track in a Grade 5, finishing fourth and beaten 7 lengths. Has performed well off the draw with a win and two places from five starts. Among the main chances.
